creator: pgiffuni@fps.biblos.unal.edu.co
text:
GDB as cross debugger for Linux and SCO are available
I am preparing cross-development environments to use with both
environments so these will come in handy (They use the same distfiles
but are two ports).

Fix: 

please change prep.ai.mit.edu/pub/gnu to GNU_SITE or whatever.
How-To-Repeat: in freebsd, incoming:
linuxgdb.tar.gz
scogdb.tar.gz
